# Swamy Reality Developers

> A family-run real estate developer based in Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh, India — designing and delivering RERA, KAUDA and DTCP approved residential plots, apartments, gated communities and custom construction across Kakinada for over 15 years.

## Company

- Name: Swamy Reality Developers
- Type: Real Estate Developer (residential)
- Location: Kakinada, East Godavari district, Andhra Pradesh, India
- Founded: 15+ years of operation
- Website: https://swamyrealitydevelopers.com
- Phone: +91 99897 78222
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919989778222

## Services

- Residential plots (open plots, premium plots)
- Apartments (2 BHK and 3 BHK)
- Gated communities
- Custom home construction
- End-to-end architectural and site planning

## Approvals & Credentials

- RERA (Real Estate Regulatory Authority, Andhra Pradesh) approved projects
- KAUDA (Kakinada Urban Development Authority) approved layouts
- DTCP (Directorate of Town & Country Planning) approved layouts
- Clear-titled, litigation-free land bank

## Projects

| Project | Type | Location | RERA ID | Approvals |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Mahatma Enclave | Gated Community | Sashikanth Nagar, Kakinada | P02400005678 | RERA, KAUDA, DTCP |
| Sri Sri Residency | Apartments | Ramanayapeta, Kakinada | P02400005712 | RERA, KAUDA |
| Swamy Satya Venkata Gardens | Premium Plots | Cheediga, Kakinada | P02400005744 | RERA, KAUDA, DTCP |
| Krishna Nagar | Gated Community | Kakinada | P02400005791 | RERA, KAUDA, DTCP |
| Lalitha Vihar | Residential Plots | Kakinada | P02400005802 | RERA, KAUDA, DTCP |
| Venkata Vihar | Premium Plots | Kakinada | P02400005817 | RERA, KAUDA, DTCP |

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://swamyrealitydevelopers.com/): Overview of Swamy Reality Developers, featured projects and testimonials.
- [Properties](https://swamyrealitydevelopers.com/properties): Full portfolio of plots, apartments and gated communities in Kakinada.
- [About](https://swamyrealitydevelopers.com/about): Company story, mission, differentiators and sustainability approach.
- [Gallery](https://swamyrealitydevelopers.com/gallery): Project photography grouped by community.
- [Blog](https://swamyrealitydevelopers.com/blog): Guides on Kakinada real estate — investment, RERA, buying, localities.
- [FAQ](https://swamyrealitydevelopers.com/faq): Answers on RERA, financing, registration and site visits.
- [Contact](https://swamyrealitydevelopers.com/contact): Office address, phone, WhatsApp and enquiry form.
